programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes in after show filled with cast interviews, and bonus footage.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Payday
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town
programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Battle of the Bags
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke host the ultimate 'Battle of the Bags' by discovering the best hacks for carrying groceries. Plus, they welcome rubber gloves to the all-star club and explore hacks from the original hack master: Benjamin Franklin.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Swimming in Hacks
programme.desc: The amount of times Kevin has tried and failed to hack a swimming pool. The city that has a love affair with bagels.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Dr. Hack to the Rescue
programme.desc: What do Beyonce and Brooke have in common? And was the first sports bra really made from two jock straps?

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks
programme.desc: Find out what country gives huge fines for chewing gum, how long you can survive without water in a zombie apocalypse, and which one of our hacks was the most expensive to make.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation
programme.desc: Find out which trick left a producer with a wasp sting, and why several crew members left with headaches. Plus, find out why Michael wore a vest two sizes too small.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Doughy Parts
programme.desc: Find out which trick was a nightmare for the crew to clean up. Plus, find out which trick Michael had to rehearse for weeks, and why he was really nervous on set.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Turn to Gold
programme.desc: Find out what trick Michael loves to perform at parties and which trick was inspired by his fascination with superhero movies. Plus, learn the name of his favorite wig.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Fishguise
programme.desc: Find out which trick was inspired by Michael's acting days, and which trick was modified because it was too messy.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

programme.title: Botched: Boob-Watch
programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra
programme.desc: The doctors help a female bodybuilder who wants to look more feminine, Paul performs surgery on a woman who has large nostril anxiety, and Katella Dash will do anything to look like a human blow-up doll.

programme.title: Botched: Four Leeches and a Funeral
programme.desc: Reality star Dwight Eubanks says farewell to his nose with a funeral, a woman's boob job has left her with a suspicious bubble on her breast, and a busty performer gives the doctors a smashing show they'll never forget.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Botched: Dolly'd Up
programme.desc: A celebrity impersonator wants to fix her saggy skin, Paul helps a woman with a potentially unfixable nose, and Daniella 'two spirits' Mendez wants a convertible implant for both a male and female option.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Blowflish Lips and Crab Claw Bits
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a woman with blowfish lips, while Dr. Dubrow takes on a difficult case of crab claw breasts. Later, a male model travels all the way from Prauge in pursuit of perfection.

programme.title: Botched: Short Changed at the Nipple Bank
programme.desc: A transgender woman who got her rhinoplasty in Mexico seeks Dr. Nassif's help to fix her collapsed nose. Then, Dr. Dubrow tackles a botched double mastectomy, and a young woman travels from the UK to look faker than fake.

programme.title: Botched: Gimme Gimme More... Surgery
programme.desc: Rajee and her nodules return to see the doctors, a young woman with mismatched breasts need a tweak and a pop star impersonator needs his nose fixed before his world tour.

programme.title: Botched: Make Titties Great Again
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a former recluse break out with new breasts, while Dr. Nassif tackles a telenovela nose job gone wrong, and the doctors meet an Ivanka trump look-alike.

programme.title: Movie: Hairspray
programme.desc: A full-figured teen dreams of dancing on a popular dance show, but ends up in detention instead. The feisty young woman later teaches Baltimore a lesson in dance and integration.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far Out
programme.desc: Guy hones in on spots that are doing it different in Syracuse and in Hoboken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Matches Made in Heaven
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's meeting up with credible combos. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the barbecue joint mashin' up a variety of styles for their unique wings and their big time beef ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Standouts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to Chicago to visit an authentic Cuban joint serving fricassee de pollo. He goes to Memphis to a neighbourhood gastro pub serving dishes like duck fried rice and homemade popcorn. In Annapolis, he savours chipolte habanero barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Massachusetts Madness
programme.desc: Guy's grubbin' from one end of Massachusetts to the other, fillin' up the tank with stuffed specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Comfort
programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Meatballs To Lollipops
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the local watering hole putting' a unique spin on standard bar food with the loaded chimi burrito and lobster lollipops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian Inspired
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting in touch with his Italian roots. First up, he pops back into an Italian market in Baltimore, where the arancini and eggplant lasagna are both off-the-hook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations

programme.title: Tanked!: The Purr-fect Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett build a 1500 gallon aquarium into the ceiling of a hotel restaurant in Florida. Then, in Seattle they build a tank for internet sensation Henri the Cat.

programme.title: Tanked!: Chicago Bull Boom Box
programme.desc: Chicago Bull's star Jimmy Butler calls Wayde and Brett to build him an old school Boombox aquarium that lights up AND plays music. But a tricky entryway throws a wrench in their plans. Oakland Raiders' Donald Penn is in serious need of a custom insert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Prince Fielder's Big Hit
programme.desc: The Texas Ranger's biggest slugger, Prince Fielder is building his man cave in his home in Orlando, Florida. No man cave is complete without an elegant, saltwater aquarium that is viewable from two sides.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Those Tanks are No Joke
programme.desc: Prankster-comedy duo Jeff Dunham and Jeff Termaine order up tanks with a sense of humor. Jeff dreams of something to pull together his prankster man cave, while Jeff is left speechless over his puppet show tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Sweet Tank O' Mine
programme.desc: ATM loves DJ Ashba! This Rock star wants a tank for his new retail store but he needs it ASAP. DJ will be hosting a huge grand opening party and the tank will be the centerpiece.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shark Byte
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett have a huge job on their hands, like 5000 gallons huge. Computer component manufacturer Samtec wants ATM to build them an aquarium unlike any other, a 20 foot long shark tank with exact replicas of their computer components inside.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Totally 90s!
programme.desc: It's a 90's throwback as the guys from ATM get the call from Neil Patrick Harris to build a Houdini inspired tank for the famous Magic Castle. Then Mario Lopez tasks them with creating a tank for the Boys & Girls Clubs of America.

programme.title: Tanked!: For Love of the Game… or Money?
programme.desc: The duo must score a touchdown with NFL's Bart Scott and turn his ponds into Club Aqua.

programme.title: Tanked!: Groovy Sarcophagus, Man
programme.desc: The ATM crew provide their unfiltered comments on a Cleoptra inspired aquarium and a tank for the head quarters of Spencer's.

programme.title: Tanked!: Jeff Dunham's Tank for Dummies
programme.desc: Ventriloquist Jeff Dunham wants a theatre-themed tank starring his characters Peanut, Walter and Achmed. The addition of a submerged chandelier gets challenging when Jeff insists it light up.

programme.title: Tanked!: Pranks and Dranks!
programme.desc: Jackass creator, Jeff Tremaine, gets a tank gnarly enough to be the centerpiece of this prankster's man cave.

programme.title: Tanked!: Going for the Gold(fish)
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett get into the patriotic spirit when Olympic basketball phenom Paul George gives them a call. He wants two identical fish tanks next to his indoor pond, and he wants it done by the time he gets home from the Olympics in Rio.

programme.title: Tanked!: Healing Garden Waterfall
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even BIGGER and BETTER than the original. Closer to home, the guys get asked to build a custom acrylic waterfall as part of a memorial in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: Real Aquariums of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erika Girardi from the hit TV show, The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills needs a tank. Also known as Erika Jayne, this Diva knows exactly what she wants and that's an octopus!

programme.title: Tanked!: Fish-a-Palooza
programme.desc: In this Fishapalooza special, we're sharing facts about the coolest and craziest fish we've built tanks for including rare sea creatures, exotic fish, and feisty crabs.

programme.title: Tanked!: Prince Royce's Royal Tank
programme.desc: Latin music star Prince Royce spices up his Miami mansion with a custom aquarium. Wayde and Brett struggle to make this tank as royal as possible but a last minute design change to the façade delays the build.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: 2 Chainz, 1 Tank
programme.desc: ATL's hottest rapper, 2 Chainz, is in search of an aquarium so he's contacted ATM. After Wayde loses some important measurements, he puts the pressure on Redneck to nail this tank and create a glowing Atlanta skyline underwater.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Parkers: Scary Kim

programme.desc: For a creative-writing project, Kim imagines her family as the Ewings from 'Dallas.'

programme.desc: The gang winds up in a homeless shelter on Thanksgiving Day after Nikki and Kim argue.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million-dollar Siblings
programme.desc: A pair of siblings vowed to their late father they would always look out for one another, so when one won the lottery, he didn't hesitate to split it.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Waterfront Windfall
programme.desc: A couple was approaching a chilly retirement when they won $1 million on a Canadian lottery. Now they're ready to pack their bags and move across the country to Nova Scotia, where David will show them gorgeous lake and oceanfront properties.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Little Sister, Big House
programme.desc: After winning $1 million, Ashley can move out of her rental in Cape Girardeau, Missouri, and buy her first home with her share of the winnings. David Bromstad helps her choose between a renovator's dream and a brand-new build.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A professional poker player with a total winning pot of $4 million is ready to go 'all in' on a huge family home along Philadelphia's Main Line area.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: The Love Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds in Des Moines, Iowa, want to start a family but their current home is barely big enough for two of them. After winning big on a scratcher, they hope David Bromstad can find the best, brand-new construction the city has to offer.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: The Luckiest Postcode in Plymouth, England
programme.desc: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen lands on the shore in Plymouth, England to help Wayne. Unable to work after an accident, Wayne's luck changed after he and his mom won 'The People's Postcode Lottery.' Laurence takes them both on a ride to find his dream home.

programme.desc: Patty won $1 million on a scratch-off and is beside herself with excitement to find the house of her dreams with the help of David Bromstad. Patty and her sister-in-law target the upmarket suburb of Spring Hill, Florida, for their search.

programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.desc: After these newlyweds bought a lotto ticket at a gas station, they filled up both their gas tank and their bank account. They are on the hunt for their dream home in Columbus, Ohio, where they can start a family.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Warm, Thick, and Saucy
programme.desc: When Gabby gets an invitation from outer space to babysit a special client on a fancy vacation planet, she dismisses Principal Swift’s objection and accepts the opportunity.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Enter the Dranis, Part One
programme.desc: Gabby dismisses Principal Swift's concern and accepts a babysitting gig with a special client on a vacation planet. Unfortunately, it looks like Swift was right to be concerned!

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Enter the Dranis, Part Two
programme.desc: Gabby dismisses Principal Swift's concern and accepts a babysitting gig with a special client on a vacation planet. Unfortunately, it looks like Swift was right to be concerned!

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Mrs. Harris' Opus

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Mom Bust You Out?
programme.desc: When Mr. Walker gives Cami Saturday detention for something that wasn't her fault, she'll have to miss her big dance competition, unless she sneaks out. With her family's help, Cami attempts the most daring detention escape any student has ever tried.

programme.title: Raven's Home: On Edge
programme.desc: When Mr. Arthur tells Booker that he isn't ready to go from sweeping floors to cutting hair at the barbershop, Booker opens his own mobile barbershop in the boys' school bathroom.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Amaya and Calder
programme.desc: The Calder and Amaya families battle it out to see who will be crowned the champion. Choreographer Phil Wright works with the families to create their dream dance performances.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Grandpa Gets Grounded
programme.desc: When Grandpa totals Byron's car, Rachel is forced to manage an entire day of errands.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Live in an Igloo?
programme.desc: Cami and Ollie try to prove that they are responsible enough to choose their own bedtime by moving out of the house and into a giant igloo in their backyard.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Baby One More Rhyme
programme.desc: Sydney enters a song writing contest and is named one of the three finalists who get to perform their song for pop star Ricky Angelo. The only catch, the producers want to make drastic changes to her song.

programme.title: Stuck in the Middle: Stuck in the Diaz Easter
programme.desc: The Diaz kids team up to save their family holiday traditions from disappearing.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Mrs. Harris' Opus

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal
programme.desc: In an effort to help Ravi make friends, Jessie takes him to a MENSA meeting in the park. However, their new friends, Madeline and Scott, may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Never Been Pierced

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Build a Sled?
programme.desc: When Charlotte backs out of their annual “Snowling” tradition for a sleepover with her friends, Cami sets out to sabotage her sister's sleepover.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cook-A-Rooney
programme.desc: To raise her grade in Mr. Clodfelter's home economics class, Maddie must win the Plate Off and defeat the class master chef, Artie. Meanwhile, Joey convinces Pete to sponsor his made-up clubs at school.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Prom-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv realizes she has a crush on Holden, but Andie asks him to prom before Liv can. With Diggie away, Karen arranges for Rooney cousin Craig to take Maddie to prom.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Flugelball-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie returns from Tundrabania, but he and Maddie have trouble reconnecting. Joey tries to solidify his relationship with Diggie through the Tundrabanian sport of Flugelball.

programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.desc: Every great story has a great beginning. Discover how Marinette and Adrien became Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Volpina
programme.desc: Adrien bonds with a new student named Lila, who claims to know Ladybug. When Marinette exposes her lie, Lila gets akumatized into Volpina. She fakes an alliance with Ladybug and Cat Noir in order to divide and destroy them.

programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.desc: When Coop and Fred go on a recycling spree to prove they care about the Earth, they accidentally throw away a sculpture that was donated for Charlotte's fundraiser.

programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.desc: When Dina considers moving back to Miami Gabby and Olivia recruit some of Gabby's alien clients to create news to keep Dina busy.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Inside The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Ed Kemper, also known as the Co-Ed Killer, murdered and dismembered 10 people, including his own mother. Former FBI agent John Douglas takes us through his extensive interviews with Kemper, which became the backbone of modern criminal psychology.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the complexities of the case against the woman branded as America’s first female serial killer. Questions still revolve around her claim of self-defense and whether or not she got the justice she deserved.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Mark Riebe
programme.desc: Piers Morgan enters Florida’s maximum security Blackwater River Correctional Facility to confront Mark Riebe, a convicted killer who has since confessed multiple times to the abduction and murder of thirteen women along Florida’s Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Bernard Giles
programme.desc: Piers Morgan sits down with Bernard Giles, a convicted serial killer who is willing to admit to his heinous crimes, and asks what motivated the man to commit those brutal acts.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Alex Henriquez
programme.desc: After finding the body of 10-year-old Jessica Guzman, police connected a series of murders to Alex Henriquez-a successful businessman, who was later sentenced to 75 years in prison. Henriquez maintains his innocence in this meeting with Piers Morgan.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Lorenzo Gilyard
programme.desc: At Missouri's Crossroads Correctional Facility, Piers Morgan comes face to face with Lorenzo Gilyard-the Kansas City Strangler, and sets out to discover what drove this soft-spoken, seemingly ordinary man to kill multiple times over seventeen years.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Knotek
programme.desc: A woman runs a boarding house with a killer eviction policy.

programme.title: Snapped: Elizabeth Guthrie-Nail
programme.desc: A biker shoots a man and his girlfriend, but the evidence leads detectives to his ex-wife's door.

programme.title: Snapped: Shellye Stark
programme.desc: A former teacher’s plea of self-defense is called into question when secrets about her sordid secret work life are revealed.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: The Snitch Who Kills
programme.desc: Law enforcement investigates a series of unsolved murders in Colorado over the course of a year.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Mad Maksim
programme.desc: A disgruntled man snaps and goes on killing spree, terrorizing the entire borough of Brooklyn, New York. Cops track the killer's trail of victims for more than 24 hours before they finally hunt him down across the city.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Dakota James
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the mysterious 2017 drowning death of a graduate student in Pittsburgh and explore whether the case is connected to the Smiley Face Killer theory they've been investigating for the past decade.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Luke Homan
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives travels to La Crosse, Wisconsin, to investigate the 2006 death of a college basketball player. They believe La Crosse is ground zero for their Smiley Face Killer theory with multiple drowning deaths of college-aged men.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Will Hurley
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives travels to Boston to investigate the 2009 death of a young Navy veteran. The victim's girlfriend spoke to him just minutes before he vanished and the team believes his death could be the work of the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Brian Welzien
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the death of a college honors student who disappeared in Chicago on the Eve of Y2K and was found on a beach in Indiana 77 days later. The team believes the case could be related to the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Tommy Booth
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigate the 2008 death of a young man in a Philadelphia suburb who was found 14 days after he went missing in an area that had been searched. The team believes his death could be related to the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Todd Geib
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives investigates the 2005 death of a man who was found in a rural Michigan lake 21 days after he went missing. With little decomposition to the body, the team believes the death could be the work of the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Cleveland Killer
programme.desc: A damaged man turns Cleveland, Ohio into a hunting ground as part of a twisted plot to exact revenge on the women who hurt him.

programme.title: Method of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When Israel Keyes is caught for the murder of 18-year-old Samantha Koenig, police have no clue what they've stumbled upon. After intense games of cat and mouse, the FBI uncovers one of the most calculated serial killers they've ever encountered.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Expendables
programme.desc: A group of highly skilled mercenaries travel to South America to overthrow the dictator of a small island. After they arrive the team is challenged by local rebels.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thursdays With Abie
programme.desc: Grampa is sitting on a bench waiting for his family when a man named Marshall Goldman approaches him and asks to hear about his life. Grampa tells Goldman about the time he was on a battleship, which was hit by an enemy torpedo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krusty is approached by two network executives who want to bring in a female co-star to increase the show's female demographic. The rapport between Krusty and Princess Penelope grows, and before long, Krusty proposes to her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Maybe
programme.desc: Homer blows off Marge to buy a lottery ticket and winds up winning the million-dollar jackpot. Fearing how Marge will react if she finds out why Homer missed their date, Homer keeps his newly inherited fortune a secret until Bart finds out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Meets Curl
programme.desc: The Simpsons head to the 2010 Vancouver Games. Marge and Homer take up curling and end up competing in the Olympic trials. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes hopelessly addicted to collecting Olympic pins.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Color Yellow
programme.desc: Lisa discovers that her Southern ancestors helped a slave, Virgil, escape to freedom and presents her family's story during Black History Month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Postcards From the Wedge
programme.desc: When Bart fails to turn in his homework, Mrs. Krabappel sends a letter home about Bart's behaviour. Despite Bart's best efforts to intercept it, Homer reads the letter, and he and Marge visit Principal Skinner for a parent-teacher conference.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stealing First Base
programme.desc: Principal Skinner announces that Mrs. Krabappel was called out of town and budget cuts dictate that, until she returns, the school's two fourth grade classes will merge. Bart reluctantly shares a desk with Nikki and develops a flirtatious rapport.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Greatest Story Ever D'Ohed
programme.desc: When Homer is playing noisily in the yard, it disrupts Flanders' bible study group. Coaxed by the reverend, a frustrated Flanders takes it upon himself to redeem Homer by inviting the Simpson family on his church retreat to Jerusalem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: American History X-cellent
programme.desc: When the police are called to diffuse a rowdy crowd at Mr. Burns' estate, one of the officers recognizes priceless stolen paintings on the walls, and the maniacal billionaire is taken downtown for questioning.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Roamin' Bob-iday
programme.desc: The family forces workaholic Bob to take a much-needed day off, only for him to wind up working at a local sandwich shop. Meanwhile, Linda and the kids throw a last-minute baby shower at the restaurant for a female biker group.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy' Through the Years
programme.desc: 'Family Guy' is reimagined as a series that's been on the air for 60 years and, in a special retrospective, it looks back at the cultural events and issues that were tackled on the show in the 1950s, ’60s and ’70s.

programme.title: Family Guy: You Can't Handle the Booth
programme.desc: In a special episode, the Griffins provide DVD commentary on a recent episode and reveal never-before-told drama between Peter and Lois.

programme.title: Archer: Reignition Sequence
programme.desc: An office romance is interrupted by the Russians.

programme.title: Archer: Achub y Morfilod
programme.desc: Archer and Lana travel to Wales for a romantic getaway of aiding separatists.

programme.title: Movie: Flatliners
programme.desc: Five curious medical students trigger their own near-death experiences as part of an experiment to study and document the afterlife. As the experiments go further and further, their actions cross a threshold that the living were never meant to cross.

programme.title: Movie: Project Almanac
programme.desc: A group of teenagers find blueprints for a time machine, which they build and use for personal gain. Their meddling has dire consequences, however, and they realize they must go back and stop their past selves from creating the machine.

programme.title: Movie: The Expendables
programme.desc: A group of highly skilled mercenaries travel to South America to overthrow the dictator of a small island. After they arrive the team is challenged by local rebels.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Your Service
programme.desc: Three soldiers who fought side by side in Iraq return home to resume their lives with their loved ones, but find that the horrors of war have come home with them. They struggle to resume their old lives while dealing with the effects of PTSD.

programme.title: Movie: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: Army medic Desmond Doss, despite believing that WWII is justified, refuses to carry a weapon into battle. After almost going to prison, he proves himself, evacuating wounded from the front lines. He risks his life to save as many soldiers as he can.

programme.title: Movie: Dr. No
programme.desc: A secret agent investigates a fellow agent's death and encounters a mysterious scientist.

programme.title: Movie: From Russia With Love
programme.desc: Bond is sent to Istanbul to steal a Russian decoding machine and ends up in a trap.

programme.title: Movie: Goldfinger
programme.desc: James Bond must prevent an international gold dealer from ruining Fort Knox's gold reserve.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show: Compilation Show
programme.desc: The people, trends, stories and aspects of celebrity culture that interest Graham Norton.

programme.title: Movie: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Secret Agent James Bond and Russian agent Triple X must work together to find missing nuclear submarines.

programme.title: Movie: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: A vengeful woman accompanies a secret agent when he searches for a lost encryption device.

programme.title: Wonders of the Moon
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning medley of lunar delights from across the globe, including blood moons, super moons, and total eclipses. Low light cameras reveal the moon in its natural light, and illustrate its extraordinary influence.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible colour change on Earth, when the greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn. See how this vibrant fiesta is created by the battles between the trees and the forests' inhabitations.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: Jailing

programme.desc: After months in the segregation unit, one inmate is tested when he returns to general population. Another inmate charged with a violent crime on the street turns to violence inside the jail.

programme.desc: One inmate learns addiction and motherhood do not make a good mix, while two others are left wondering which of them is the father of her child. Plus, when a feud from the streets boils over in the jail, deputies are forced to respond.

programme.desc: An online post from a diehard Dodgers fan leads to his arrest at a Reds game. And a tragic shooting leaves one inmate facing prison time and outrage over his punishment leads to more arrests.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Angie/ Paul

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Rookie Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is ten weeks in to her field training and makes a potentially fatal mistake. She and her boyfriend - also a rookie - must learn to deal with the realities that come with the dangerous job.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie Mark Monson doesn't like taking orders from his female boss; an overconfident marine who is now a cop responds to a 'shots fired' call.

programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Stephanie Santerre goes missing, everyone in her life falls under scrutiny. An emerging web of lies and deception leaves investigators to puzzle out the sordid truth.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder in a devout prayer group triggers a bizarre investigation in Oregon. As police uncover the unlikely culprits pulling the strings, chilling beliefs are brought to light.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Wanted Howard Pilmar Dead?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores the riveting real-life murder mystery around the death of a New York City businessman and the 23-year search for answers.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.desc: New exclusive access and never before heard testimony gives a unique insight into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Ted Bundy. Breathtaking archive from the time and the voice of Bundy himself, reveals the monster inside the man.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: Mind of a Monster

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Wanted Howard Pilmar Dead?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores the riveting real-life murder mystery around the death of a New York City businessman and the 23-year search for answers.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Secret Vows
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Devon Guzman is found dead in the backseat of her car, it sends shockwaves through her grieving community. But detectives soon discover Devon's love life was a time bomb-- a web of jealousy and betrayal that seemed destined for disaster.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Manner of Murder
programme.desc: Everyone in town adores Sara Dixon, and police are baffled when they discover her shot dead in her sleep. Their only clue: Christmas tinsel that the killer tracked in. Rumors of a secret family feud will soon reveal a story of monstrous betrayal.

programme.title: Bill Cosby: An American Scandal
programme.desc: Take a look deep inside the secret life of this comedy legend. With exclusive interviews and insider details, we uncover shocking family drama and examine the allegations that brought about his epic fall from grace.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Hero Who Wasn't
programme.desc: When a couple enters their home during a robbery in progress, a deadly shoot out erupts, leaving two people dead. But when police begin an investigation they discover clues that it may not have been what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: When a popular woman disappears from her home, police work tirelessly to uncover the route of her last known movements. Would a trail of videotape lead them to her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: See No Evil: Blood Bath
programme.desc: Mother of two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered within her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the unexpected and horrific truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Closing Time
programme.desc: While heading up the investigation of two separate homicide cases, Detective Pat Postiglione makes a surprising discovery. The same psychotic killer is behind all the murders and he has a unique calling card.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: An Obsession
programme.desc: The crime scene of a double murder shows evidence of conflicting motives. An unlikely clue on the living room floor helps Detective Postiglione zero in on what really happened, leading to the arrest of an unassuming killer.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Presidential Special
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the stories of Pocahontas, Lewis and Clark and the women's suffrage movement.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.desc: Mike, Mariellen and their two sons have vacationed in Galveston, Texas, for years, and now they're ready to buy a beach home of their own. Broker Barbara Zimmerman is here to help them find a house with a boat lift for fisherman Mike.

programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Million Dollar View Pool
programme.desc: The King family seeks help building their new palace in the sunny hills of California. The Pool Kings find themselves between a rock ledge and hard design while bringing this build to life on a sloped property.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The All-American Rejects
programme.desc: Four bakers vie to present their cupcakes at a VIP party for The All-American Rejects.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The King Of Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four cupcake makers will fight for the opportunity to serve their very own cupcakes at a Memphis party in celebration of The King, Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. He also bites the heads off of some puppets.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fish-and-chips show with a brand-new recipe for French fries and fish sticks.

programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads his original pressure cooker episode with a brand-new broth and his take on the Vietnamese classic, pho.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Insecure: Messy as F**k
programme.desc: At breakfast, Issa tells Molly she wants to be the 'no f**ks' version of herself. Having tried both Issa and Molly on their cells, Lawrence calls his friend Chad to talk but Chad is distracted and cuts Lawrence off.

programme.title: Insecure: Racist as F**k
programme.desc: In bed, together, Lawrence and Issa try to get back into their couple's groove but it proves challenging. Lawrence meets with a head-hunter, concerned that he hasn't found a job yet.

programme.title: Insecure: Thirsty as F**k
programme.desc: Lawrence takes an early morning jog. Issa invites him into the shower but the moment is more awkward that sexy when they factor in water temperature and positioning.

programme.title: Insecure: Shady as F**K
programme.desc: Issa shows Lawrence the 'Broken Pu**y' video, freaked that it will undermine her authority at school. He tells her not to worry, the kids will have forgotten about it by Monday. Unfortunately, that isn't the case.

programme.title: Insecure: Guilty as F**k
programme.desc: Imaging Lawrence's reaction, Issa decides not to tell him that she cheated with Daniel. Waking up on Jared's couch, Molly admits she messed up and apologizes. Jared asks about her plans for the day and they have sex in his kitchen.

programme.title: Insecure: Real as F**k
programme.desc: Molly helps Issa pick out a dress for a fundraiser. Although nervous that morning, Lawrence nails his job interview and his offered a position on the spot.

programme.title: Insecure: Broken as F**k
programme.desc: After three days of not hearing from Lawrence, Issa leaves him another apologetic voicemail asking him to call her back. Issa calls Molly, expecting her to be over their fight. At a club one night, Kelli dares the ladies to be on their 'worst behaviour.'

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Great
programme.desc: Issa struggles in the aftermath of her breakup with Lawrence, while facing challenges at a new work assignment. Molly questions her worth at work and Lawrence adjusts to his new living arrangement.

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Questions
programme.desc: Issa tries to make sense of a cryptic encounter and Lawrence considers crucial decisions after receiving some harsh truths. Molly plots to join the office 'boys club' and Issa and Frieda encounter a problematic vice-principal.

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Open
programme.desc: A sexually frustrated Issa explores a new outlook on dating. On a girls' night out, Molly meets a promising new guy and Lawrence's new work friends test his commitment.

programme.title: Insecure: Hella LA
programme.desc: Issa has her newfound confidence shaken at a day party. Molly has a blast from the past with a childhood friend. Elsewhere, a trip to the grocery store turns into a wild and crazy night for Lawrence.

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Shook

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Blows

programme.title: Insecure: Hella Disrespectful
programme.desc: Follow the experiences and racy tribulations of a modern day African-American woman.

programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to balance his personal life with that of his superhero alter ego. After two years of fighting crime, he quits to focus on his own problems. When Doc Ock turns himself into a super villain, Peter once again decides to play the hero.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: A disgraced writer and a female hacker learn that wealthy families are hiding the most skeletons in their closets when they are hired to solve an old murder.

programme.title: Movie: Into the Grizzly Maze

programme.title: Movie: Extract
programme.desc: A man's extract production plant is in jeopardy after one employee is hurt on the job, and another employee is trying to scam the company for all its money. Not only is his business falling apart, but he also suspects his wife is cheating on him.

programme.title: Movie: Searching
programme.desc: After his teenage daughter goes missing, a father begins scouring the contents of her laptop and online presence in a search for clues that can help him find her, but he soon discovers that he doesn't know his daughter as well as he'd thought.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling cops are sent back to high school where they attempt to blend in to take down a drug ring.

programme.title: Movie: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: Being a night guard at the Museum of Natural History was nothing like what Larry Daley, a single father, was expecting. Once the museum closes for the night, Larry starts hearing strange noises and discovers that the exhibitions come to life.

programme.title: Movie: Spider-Man

programme.title: Hoarders: John/ Vivian
programme.desc: John is a retired corrections officer living in a house with more than 30 cats hiding in the walls and ceilings. Vivian's hoard has literally pushed her husband Sylvester out of the house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Susan and Michael
programme.desc: Susan is addicted to buying and selling cars and electronics, but she never manages to sell much. Michael is a hoarder and he and his dog live like sardines packed in a can of clutter.

programme.title: Hoarders: Diana/ Dolores
programme.desc: Diana's hoarding became so extreme that her daughter was forced to sleep in a recliner because the trash had overtaken her room. Dolores' hoard could catch on fire and burn her house down at any time.

programme.title: Hoarders: Fuzzie and Fredd/ Nancy
programme.desc: Fuzzie and Fredd have been living like teenagers and have stuffed their home with records, toys, comic books and more. Tired of supporting them, Fuzzie's father wants them to clean up. Also, Nancy's hoard is out of control with dirty clothes and cobwebs.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roy/ Loretta
programme.desc: Roy is facing $20 million in fines from the county for hoarding hundreds of vehicles on his property. After being robbed at gunpoint, Loretta started to hoard everything in her home.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Valley Songbird
programme.desc: A popular Nashville performer tries one more attempt at getting wider recognition.

programme.title: Movie: Joyful Noise
programme.desc: As they prepare for an upcoming national championship, two choir directors face off for control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
